name: SARS-CoV-2_frameshift_element_orf1ab
description: Programmed -1 ribosomal frameshift (PRF) element at ORF1a/ORF1b junction. Slippery sequence UUUAAAC + downstream pseudoknot (attenuator hairpin + 3-stem pseudoknot). Conserved across betacoronaviruses; drug target (merafloxacin, PK-class). Frameshift efficiency ~25-50%.
